description: Extract function name and parameter values from user query and format as required JSON structure

inputs.name: query_text
inputs.description: The user query text containing the request to parse for function parameters and values

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: String representation of available function definitions with parameters and types

output.description: Returns a list containing a single dictionary with the function name as key and parameter arrays as values. Example structure: [{"calculate_triangle_area": {"base": [10], "height": [5], "unit": ["units", ""]}}]. The parameter values are extracted from the user query and formatted as arrays with actual values followed by empty strings for optional parameters.

workflow_spec.name: Function Call Parser
workflow_spec.description: Parse user query to generate appropriate function call with extracted parameters in the required JSON structure format
